Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS

1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
INTDIS_COMBINED_EVER Intellectual Disabilities and Related Conditions - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
